Název: Knowledge management systems in public universities: a design science approach
Autoři: Tomášková H.; Novák J.; Svoboda P.
Abstrakt: This study proposes a reference architecture for institutional knowledge bases in Czech higher education.
Klíčová slova: knowledge management; higher education; design science
Metodologie: Design science research with two case studies at Czech universities (interviews n=18, document analysis, prototype evaluation).
Hlavní zjištění: The proposed architecture reduces information fragmentation and improves traceability of research outputs for accreditation.
Poznámka: STYLE SAMPLE: We argue that institutional knowledge bases must balance openness with governance constraints typical of public universities.

Název: Digital transformation maturity in regional HEIs: mixed-methods evidence from Central Europe
Abstrakt: Regional universities lag behind national leaders in digital transformation; the paper identifies capability gaps and enablers.
Klíčová slova: digital transformation; higher education; maturity model
Metodologie: Sequential explanatory mixed methods: online survey (n=214), semi-structured interviews (n=12), thematic coding in MAXQDA.
Hlavní zjištění: Maturity is driven more by leadership commitment than by IT budget; faculty digital pedagogy is the main bottleneck.
Poznámka: STYLE SAMPLE: Our findings suggest that transformation initiatives fail when treated as purely technical projects rather than organisational change.
